title: Meta is testing the AI bedtime story app StoryKit in certain countries and regions
excerpt: Meta announced on July 21, 2026, that it is testing a new AI story creation application called StoryKit in certain countries and regions. The app aims to help p
content_html:
Meta announced on July 21, 2026, that it is testing a new AI story creation application called StoryKit in certain countries and regions. The app aims to help parents create personalized storybooks for children, supporting customized characters, settings, values lessons, and background music.

Users can generate virtual characters by taking photos of toys or people, and set the world view and moral themes. The official emphasized that the app is only for users aged 18 and above, with built-in AI safety filters, and does not include any social features.

As another exploration by Meta in the consumer-grade generative AI field, StoryKit reflects how tech giants are accelerating the integration of large model technology into specific scenarios of daily life. In the context of mixed market feedback on its previous AI entertainment and hardware products, the testing of such applications not only demonstrates the potential of multimodal and text generation technologies in personalized content distribution, but also reignites in-depth discussions in the industry about technological boundaries, children's mental health, and the possible reshaping of traditional parent-child interaction models.

The app aims to help parents create personalized storybooks for children, supporting customized characters, settings, values lessons, and background music.Users can generate virtual characters by taking photos of toys or people, and set the world view and moral themes. The app aims to help parents create personalized storybooks for children, supporting customized characters, settings, values lessons, and background music.

sentences.en: Meta announced on July 21, 2026, that it is testing a new AI story creation application called StoryKit in certain countries and regions.
sentences.zh: Meta于2026年7月21日宣布，正在某些国家和地区测试一款名为StoryKit的新型人工智能故事创作应用程序。

sentences.en: The app aims to help parents create personalized storybooks for children, supporting customized characters, settings, values lessons, and background music.
sentences.zh: 该应用旨在帮助家长为孩子制作个性化的故事书，支持定制角色、场景、价值观课程和背景音乐。

blocks.html_en: Users can generate virtual characters by taking photos of toys or people, and set the world view and moral themes. The official emphasized that the app is only for users aged 18 and above, with built-in AI safety filters, and does not include any social features.

sentences.en: Users can generate virtual characters by taking photos of toys or people, and set the world view and moral themes.
sentences.zh: 用户可以通过拍摄玩具或人的照片来生成虚拟角色，并设定世界观和道德主题。

sentences.en: The official emphasized that the app is only for users aged 18 and above, with built-in AI safety filters, and does not include any social features.
sentences.zh: 官方强调，该应用仅适用于18岁及以上用户，内置AI安全过滤器，不包含任何社交功能。

In the context of mixed market feedback on its previous AI entertainment and hardware products, the testing of such applications not only demonstrates the potential of multimodal and text generation technologies in personalized content distribution, but also reignites in-depth discussions in the industry about technological boundaries, children's mental health, and the possible reshaping of traditional parent-child interaction models.

sentences.en: As another exploration by Meta in the consumer-grade generative AI field, StoryKit reflects how tech giants are accelerating the integration of large model technology into specific scenarios of daily life.
sentences.zh: 作为Meta在消费级生成AI领域的又一次探索，StoryKit体现了科技巨头如何加速将大模型技术融入日常生活特定场景。

sentences.en: In the context of mixed market feedback on its previous AI entertainment and hardware products, the testing of such applications not only demonstrates the potential of multimodal and text generation technologies in personalized content distribution, but also reignites in-depth discussions in the industry about technological boundaries, children's mental health, and the possible reshaping of traditional parent-child interaction models.
sentences.zh: 在此前的AI娱乐和硬件产品市场反馈褒贬不一的背景下，此类应用的测试不仅展示了多模态和文本生成技术在个性化内容分发方面的潜力，也重新引发了业界关于技术边界、儿童心理健康以及传统亲子互动模式可能重塑的深入讨论。

content_html_zh:
Meta于2026年7月21日宣布，正在某些国家和地区测试一款名为StoryKit的新型人工智能故事创作应用程序。 该应用旨在帮助家长为孩子制作个性化的故事书，支持定制角色、场景、价值观课程和背景音乐。

用户可以通过拍摄玩具或人的照片来生成虚拟角色，并设定世界观和道德主题。 官方强调，该应用仅适用于18岁及以上用户，内置AI安全过滤器，不包含任何社交功能。

作为Meta在消费级生成AI领域的又一次探索，StoryKit体现了科技巨头如何加速将大模型技术融入日常生活特定场景。 在此前的AI娱乐和硬件产品市场反馈褒贬不一的背景下，此类应用的测试不仅展示了多模态和文本生成技术在个性化内容分发方面的潜力，也重新引发了业界关于技术边界、儿童心理健康以及传统亲子互动模式可能重塑的深入讨论。
